headline: BlackRock Inc (BLK) Offers Dividend As It Sees Crypto Shaping Markets
summary: BlackRock Inc (NYSE:BLK) is one of the most profitable crypto-exposed stocks to buy now. On May 20, BlackRock Inc (NYSE:BLK) said that it plans to pay a quarterly cash dividend of $5.73 per share. It stated that the dividend would be distributed on June 23, with the payment covering shareholders of record as of June […]

headline: 10-year Treasury yield is steady even after data showing highest inflation since 2023
summary: U.S. Treasury yields were little changed on Wednesday as traders assessed critical inflation data.
